signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved into flush territory, so I would rather wait for a bounce than force a new short here.
COMP remains the only real long candidate because funding is deeply negative while price is still holding up, though poor liquidity keeps confidence capped.
VVV remains the clearest short because the tape is still weak and the coin has not shown any real sign of reversal yet.
BIO is too low-liquidity and too mixed structurally to justify a fresh directional trade.
POLYX has squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
CHILLGUY is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
AERO is already deeply flushed and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
